$comment: Sample schema for validate_csv.py — data-validation skill
description: Schema definition for student enrollment CSV data

columns.name: student_id
columns.$comment: Student identifier — must be unique and non-null

columns.name: email
columns.$comment: Contact email — validated against email format

columns.name: grade
columns.$comment: Letter grade — must be one of the allowed values

columns.name: enrollment_date
columns.$comment: Enrollment date — ISO-8601 or JP-slash format

columns.name: department
columns.$comment: Department code — must match pattern like 'CS-101', 'MATH-202'
